name: Salm Nach Basler Art/ Salmon Basel Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the fillets with salt and pepper, squeeze lemon juice over them, and let marinate for a short time.
2. Dredge onion rings in flour. Shake off excess.
3. Dredge fish in remaining flour. Brown quickly in combined butter and oil (5-6 minutes on each side).
4. Remove fish from pan; arrange on warm plate. Place onion rings on top.
5. Deglaze the pan with fish stock and serve sauce over salmon.
6. Serve with boiled potatoes.
